'''鈭歝h-zh-n''' ('''kachazhan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ying|ying]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-zh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ying|ying]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-zh-n
|-
! Lemma
| kachazhan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichazhan|thichazhan]] || [[word:jichazhan|jichazhan]] || [[word:shichazhan|shichazhan]] || [[word:kichazhan|kichazhan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchazhan|thuthuchazhan]] || [[word:jujuchazhan|jujuchazhan]] || [[word:shushuchazhan|shushuchazhan]] || [[word:kukuchazhan|kukuchazhan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchazhan|thuchazhan]] || [[word:juchazhan|juchazhan]] || [[word:shuchazhan|shuchazhan]] || [[word:kuchazhan|kuchazhan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchazhan|thuchazhan]] || [[word:juchazhan|juchazhan]] || [[word:shuchazhan|shuchazhan]] || [[word:kuchazhan|kuchazhan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechazhan|thechazhan]] || [[word:jechazhan|jechazhan]] || [[word:shechazhan|shechazhan]] || [[word:kechazhan|kechazhan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochazhan|thothochazhan]] || [[word:jojochazhan|jojochazhan]] || [[word:shoshochazhan|shoshochazhan]] || [[word:kokochazhan|kokochazhan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochazhan|thochazhan]] || [[word:jochazhan|jochazhan]] || [[word:shochazhan|shochazhan]] || [[word:kochazhan|kochazhan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochazhan|thochazhan]] || [[word:jochazhan|jochazhan]] || [[word:shochazhan|shochazhan]] || [[word:kochazhan|kochazhan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chazhan|th忙chazhan]] || [[word:j忙chazhan|j忙chazhan]] || [[word:sh忙chazhan|sh忙chazhan]] || [[word:k忙chazhan|k忙chazhan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachazhan|thathachazhan]] || [[word:jajachazhan|jajachazhan]] || [[word:shashachazhan|shashachazhan]] || [[word:kakachazhan|kakachazhan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachazhan|thachazhan]] || [[word:jachazhan|jachazhan]] || [[word:shachazhan|shachazhan]] || [[word:kachazhan|kachazhan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachazhan|thachazhan]] || [[word:jachazhan|jachazhan]] || [[word:shachazhan|shachazhan]] || [[word:kachazhan|kachazhan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachazhan|shachazhan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachazhan|goshachazhan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachazhan|gokishachazhan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachazhan眉|shachazhan眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachazhankn眉|goshachazhankn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazhan眉|gokishachazhan眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachazhansh毛|shachazhansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachazhanksh毛|goshachazhanksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachazhansh毛|gokishachazhansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazhanro|shachazhanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazhankro|goshachazhankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazhanro|gokishachazhanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazhanmu|shachazhanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazhankmu|goshachazhankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazhanmu|gokishachazhanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachazhansher|shachazhansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachazhanksher|goshachazhanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachazhansher|gokishachazhansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachazhang|shachazhang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachazhankng|goshachazhankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachazhang|gokishachazhang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachazhanya|shachazhanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachazhankya|goshachazhankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachazhanya|gokishachazhanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachazhanyam|shachazhanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachazhankyam|goshachazhankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachazhanyam|gokishachazhanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachazhan眉sh毛|shachazhan眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachazhankn眉sh毛|goshachazhankn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachazhan眉sh毛|gokishachazhan眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazhan眉ro|shachazhan眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazhankn眉ro|goshachazhankn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazhan眉ro|gokishachazhan眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazhan眉mu|shachazhan眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazhankn眉mu|goshachazhankn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazhan眉mu|gokishachazhan眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachazhansh毛n眉|shachazhansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachazhanksh毛n眉|goshachazhanksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazhansh毛n眉|gokishachazhansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazhansh毛ro|shachazhansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazhanksh毛ro|goshachazhanksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazhansh毛ro|gokishachazhansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazhansh毛mu|shachazhansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazhanksh毛mu|goshachazhanksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazhansh毛mu|gokishachazhansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachazhanron眉|shachazhanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachazhankron眉|goshachazhankron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazhanron眉|gokishachazhanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachazhanrosh毛|shachazhanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachazhankrosh毛|goshachazhankrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachazhanrosh毛|gokishachazhanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazhanromu|shachazhanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazhankromu|goshachazhankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazhanromu|gokishachazhanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachazhanmun眉|shachazhanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachazhankmun眉|goshachazhankmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazhanmun眉|gokishachazhanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachazhanmush毛|shachazhanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachazhankmush毛|goshachazhankmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachazhanmush毛|gokishachazhanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazhanmuro|shachazhanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazhankmuro|goshachazhankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazhanmuro|gokishachazhanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
